title: Weekend Weather Forecast: Cooler and Drier
summary: A significant cooldown is expected for the upcoming weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update for the local community, impacting weekend plans.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder Over Construction Issues
summary: Denver couple wins $1.6M against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation due to flooding and delays.
charlotte_impact: Highlights risks in construction and importance of due diligence; impacts future homeowner-builder relations.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer has been suspended for punching a woman during an arrest. The officer's identity has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police conduct and accountability within the community.

title: Wrongful Death Suit Filed in Plane Crash That Killed 7
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife, Nicole Biffle, files a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence in the plane crash that killed 7 at Statesville Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: Addresses legal ramifications and accountability following a tragic aviation accident.

title: Thieves Target Clover Neighborhood in Car Break-in Spree
summary: Clover neighborhood experiences a second wave of car break-ins, with at least one gun stolen this week.
charlotte_impact: Increases awareness of local crime trends and encourages residents to take precautions.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges Involving Former Student
summary: David Steelman, 51, turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Deals with serious allegations of sexual misconduct, impacting school safety and community trust.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Apron Expansion
summary: The FAA awards Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand the airport apron, part of a nationwide effort to modernize aviation infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Supports airport development, improving capacity and efficiency for travelers and the local economy.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in North Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent dies 10 months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police seek information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the ongoing search for justice.

title: CMPD Arrests Suspect in Hit-and-Run of 8-Year-Old
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris arrested for felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a car near Quail Hollow Middle School.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community safety concerns and the legal consequences of reckless driving.

title: Charlotte Transit System Reports 69% Drop in Crime
summary: Charlotte's transit system reports a 69% drop in crime on buses and light rail following security initiatives.
charlotte_impact: Indicates improved safety and security on public transportation, benefiting commuters.

title: Mecklenburg County Liquor Purchases Fund Community Projects
summary: Audit reveals Mecklenburg County liquor purchases fund community projects, increasing law enforcement and alcohol education spending.
charlotte_impact: Shows how alcohol sales contribute to local funding for important community services.

title: 16-Year-Old Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: A 16-year-old drowned in Lake Wylie after failing to resurface after jumping into the water on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes water safety and the potential dangers of recreational activities.

title: Woman Killed in Single-Vehicle Crash in Rock Hill
summary: A 50-year-old woman died in a single-vehicle crash on Red River Road after her vehicle hit a fence and overturned.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks of driving and the importance of road safety.

title: Charlotte Student-Athlete Breaks Coach's 41-Year-Old Record
summary: ZaNovia Davis breaks Garinger High's 400m record, previously held by her coach, Tanya Filmore-Scott, for 41 years.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates local athletic achievement and the passing of a legacy to a new generation.

title: Multiple Arrests in North Charlotte Drug and Firearms Case
summary: Federal and local operations lead to multiple arrests in a north Charlotte case involving drug trafficking and firearms charges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses crime and drug-related issues in the community, impacting public safety.
